meta.title: Italo Cabral — Full-Stack & AI Analyst
meta.description: Full-stack Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience. Specialist in AI agents, RAG pipelines, software architecture, and high-performance systems.

hero.name: Italo Cabral
hero.summary: Software Engineer with 5+ years of full-stack development experience. Specialist in AI agents, RAG pipelines, and LLM integration in production products — from architecture to deployment — combining solid software engineering with intelligent, scalable solutions.
highlights: AI Agents & RAG
Software Architecture
English C2

about.title: About me
paragraphs: Throughout my career at large multinational companies, I've built critical systems applying best practices and clean code principles, always focused on delivering results.

My AI experience goes beyond code: I design agent architectures, orchestrate flows with LangChain, apply prompt engineering, and translate business needs into intelligent solutions. I have strong analytical skills, data migration experience, and regularly mentor others with a collaborative, communicative profile.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: A track record across industries, with a growing focus on AI, measurable impact, and delivery quality.

items.description: I develop and evolve artificial intelligence solutions including autonomous agents, RAG pipelines, high-performance backends, automated workflows, and databases. Responsible for turning AI use cases into scalable, secure, production-ready products.
highlights: Defined AI agent architecture, stack selection (LLMs, vector stores, orchestrators), and technical standards for the team
Built intelligent agents and automated flows with LangChain, integrating APIs and eliminating manual steps
Designed and implemented API integrations that optimized workflows and reduced reliance on manual processes
Technical mentorship in best practices, code quality, and versioning; internal talks and conference representation on AI

items.description: Led refactoring and development of a critical healthcare system, focusing on scalability, reliability, and performance. Defined technical approaches, established development standards, and mentored multidisciplinary teams.
highlights: Built automated TypeScript tool for malformed legacy data migration — timeline reduced from 3 months to 3–5 days
Applied concurrency and async processing for parallel table migration with guaranteed referential integrity
Created flexible mapping between old and new schemas, preserving historical data without information loss
Mentored junior and mid-level teams on SOLID, Clean Code, testing, and structured code reviews

items.description: Responsible for evolving and maintaining a high-performance information query system. Built features that expanded system capacity, created layouts for complex data, and led complete internal API refactoring focused on maintainability and performance.
highlights: Implemented PIX-integrated payment system, eliminating manual validation and reducing balance release from up to 2 days to instant
Automated billing flow, replacing error-prone manual processes with a reliable digital solution
Improved customer experience with real-time balance top-up and greater operational efficiency for support teams
Designed payment gateway integration ensuring security, traceability, and business rule compliance

items.description: Developed features for a complex import/export operations management system. Performed proactive maintenance, optimized databases, and provided technical guidance for the team to adopt best practices.
highlights: Built new features on a critical foreign trade system with a focus on stability
Performed proactive maintenance and bug fixes, ensuring incident prevention in production
Managed and optimized databases, creating efficient scripts for querying, analysis, and data visualization
Provided technical guidance for the team on best practices and new technologies

items.description: Developed a complete e-commerce application from conception to production delivery. Integrated frontend and backend ensuring performance, responsiveness, and a fluid experience, with transparent checkout and integrated payments.
highlights: Built end-to-end e-commerce application, from architecture design to production deployment
Integrated frontend and backend focused on performance, responsiveness, and a smooth purchase journey
Implemented transparent checkout with integrated payment system, improving conversion reliability
Delivered complete solution in production with monitoring and operational stability

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Personal work showcasing my technical approach and creativity — with a strong emphasis on AI solutions.

items.name: SynVault
items.tagline: Intelligent synapses. Content in the vault.
items.outcome: Full RAG pipeline with per-agent content isolation and customizable production responses.
items.description: AI agent that merges the power of digital synapses — RAG connections linking questions to the right knowledge — with vault-grade security (MinIO), where custom content stays isolated and protected. Efficient, controlled, and highly customizable responses, with a full pipeline of embeddings, vector storage, and agent orchestration.

items.name: Geno
items.outcome: REST API with cryptographically secure slugs and built-in basic analytics.
items.description: Simple and efficient URL shortener with secure slug generation via cryptography, basic analytics, and RESTful API for integration.

items.name: DevPulse
items.outcome: Real-time monitoring with alerts and uptime history — in development.
items.description: API and service monitoring dashboard with real-time alerts, uptime history, and metrics visualization — placeholder for your next project.

talks.title: Talks & Mentorship
talks.subtitle: Sharing knowledge on AI, software engineering, and career growth through talks, mentorship, and workshops.

topics.title: Prompt Engineering
topics.description: Learn how to get the best out of your AI tools with clear, structured, results-driven prompts.

topics.title: Assertive Communication
topics.description: How to express yourself confidently and directly, with clarity and professionalism in any setting.

topics.title: Personal Branding
topics.description: Respect yourself by selling your skills the right way — with an effective resume and a standout LinkedIn profile.

topics.title: AI Agents in Production
topics.description: How to design, build, and deploy intelligent agents in production — from RAG pipelines to LangChain orchestration.

topics.title: Architecture & Clean Code
topics.description: SOLID principles, clean code, and architectural patterns that sustain critical systems in high-stakes environments.

topics.title: Data Migration at Scale
topics.description: Strategies to transform legacy databases into modern structures with integrity, performance, and minimal operational risk.

mentorship.title: Career Mentorship
mentorship.description: Personalized guidance for tech career starters — from first steps to interview preparation and market positioning.

workshops.title: Talks & Workshops
workshops.description: Corporate training and workshops on AI, intelligent agents, software engineering, best practices, and productivity for teams of all levels.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's talk — I'm open to new opportunities, partnerships, and ideas involving technology and artificial intelligence.
contact.intro: Whether it's a job opening, freelance project, mentorship, talk invitation, or simply sharing experiences about software engineering and AI, I'd love to hear from you. Pick your preferred channel below.
contact.availability: Typical response time: within 48 business hours.

channels.label: Email
channels.description: Best channel for professional proposals, talk invitations, mentorship, and more detailed conversations.

channels.label: WhatsApp
channels.description: Quick and direct messaging — ideal for a first contact or informal conversations.

channels.label: LinkedIn
channels.description: Connect to follow my journey, AI-related content, and professional opportunities.

channels.label: GitHub
channels.description: Explore repositories, personal projects, and open-source contributions including AI solutions.
